feat.name: Incredible Familiar
feat.special: Add the bonus familiar abilities you gain for being a witch to this amount.
feat.text: Your familiar is imbued with even more magic than other familiars. You can select a base of six familiar or master abilities each day, instead of four.

traits.name: Animist
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the animist class.

traits.name: Thaumaturge
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the thaumaturge class.

traits.name: Witch
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the witch class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
